name: swe-stack
description: SWE Stack plugins for local-first agent workflows.

plugins.name: whatsapp
plugins.description: Work with WhatsApp chats, message context, media, and reviewable drafts.

plugins.name: oracle
plugins.description: Use a logged-in ChatGPT Pro session as a GPT-5.5 Pro second-opinion workflow.

plugins.name: gmail-cli
plugins.description: Use Gmail raw-message, MIME, and attachment workflows through the authenticated gws CLI.

plugins.name: google-drive-cli
plugins.description: Use Google Drive search, download, export, upload, and sharing workflows through gws.

plugins.name: google-tasks
plugins.description: Use Google Tasks reads and guarded mutations through gws.

plugins.name: google-contacts
plugins.description: Use Google Contacts identity, phone, organization, and WhatsApp-enrichment lookups through gws.

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: Use ElevenLabs audio and speech tools from Claude Code.

plugins.name: android-phone
plugins.description: Inspect, test, debug, and control Android phones through ADB.

plugins.name: symphony
plugins.description: Symphony workflow protocols for Pedro's explicit lifecycle loops: evidence intake, requirements elicitation, implementation dispatch, Linear hygiene.
